1695300.name: ALTDEUS: Beyond Chronos Episode Yamato
1695300.description: In the new DLC, ALTDEUS: Beyond Chronos EPISODE YAMATO, you will play as Second Lieutenant Yamato Amanagi, a member of Prometheus and pilot of the Ares Makhia.Experience the dramatic scenes in a certain route from Yamato's point of view in this new scenario. This time, you'll be charging into a new battle in the cockpit of the Ares Makhia, with a sword in your metal hands and a decision to make. When you have to face off against the friend you've sworn to protect, will you be able to swing your blade?Note that this DLC is strongly connected to The Celestial Crade ending of the game.Supports English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and French subtitles.─ StoryA brand new story experienced from the perspective of Yamato.Facing away from Prometheus, Chloe attempts to escape, taking Anima with her.Yamato stands in her way, carrying the hopes of his comrades, to bring her back - or die trying.
1695300.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
